text: pawlws 'asyrih dyshw' mshyḥa': wṭymati'ws 'aḥwna': lpylimwn mwḥeba' wpalaḥa' d'aman:
wla'pya' mwḥebtan: wla'rkypws sarbaz 'aman: wl'idta' dgaw baytwk:
shapaqat 'amawkwn wshlama' mn 'alaha' baban wmn maran yshw' mshyḥa'.
shakwri' ywen l'alahy bkl zabna': wbedkarwk ywen bṣlawaty:
ha' mn dshme'ly ḥwbwk whaymanwta' d'yt lwk lkes maran yshw': wlkes klay qadyshi':
dhawya' sharykwta' dhaymanwtwk beplaḥa' bydi'ta' dkl ṭabta' d'yt lawkwn byshw' mshyḥa'.
sabab dḥadwta' raba' 'yt lan wyahbalta' dleba' bḥwbwk: dpeshlwn mwnyeḥi' bywk ma'yi' dqadyshi': 'aḥwny.
sabab d'aha': 'apen dbestaywta' raba' 'yt ly bmshyḥa' dpaqden hwa' lwk 'any dyna' wageb:
'yna' msabab dḥwba' zawda' parpwli' ywen bywk: 'ana' dywen ḥad hadka' 'ayk pawlws saba': w'adya' 'wp 'asyra' dyshw' mshyḥa':
wparpwli' ywen bywk mbadal dbrwny: hw dmwledly byeswry: 'anisymws:
hw dbḥad zabna' layt hwa' lwk byih payda': 'yna' 'adya' 'wp 'elwk 'wp 'ely mari' payda' yli':
hw dqam shadrenih lkeslwk: bganih: dyli' har ma'yi' dyy.
hw dba'yen hwa' dḥamen hwa' lih lkesly: dhawi' be'bady ḥelmat mn giba' dywk byeswri' d'iwangalywn:
'yna' dla' ra'yy dywk la' bsemla' ly mendy le'bada': dṭabtwk la' hawya' 'ayk dbḥayla': 'ela' brezaywk.
'yna' qawma' 'wp sabab d'aha' shwnili' (mkeslwk) ḥda' sa'at: dl'alam dabqet lih:
m'adya' la' 'ayk riga': 'ela' zawda' mn riga': 'aḥwna' mwḥeba' raba': 'ela'ki' dyy: wkma' zawda' dywk: 'wp bbesra' 'wp bmaran.
'en hadka' sharyka' dyy ywet: qabel lih 'ayk d'ely.
'en mendy na'haq 'bedli' bywk: yan daynana' yli': 'aha' 'aly ḥashben:
'ana' pawlws ktebly b'ydy' 'ana' bet par'en: dla' 'amrenwk d'wp ganwk daynana' ywet 'ely.
hi': 'aḥwny: 'ana' payshen mwnyeḥa' bywk bmaran. manyeḥ ma'yy bmarya'.
sabab ḥatergm' ywen dki' sham'et ly ktebly 'elwk: kad byda'ya' dzawda' mn mendy d'amren ki' 'abdet.
'yna' bḥda' gaha' 'wp hader 'ely dwkta' dshrayta': sabab bhiby ywen dbṣlawatawkwn bet payshen ywhba' 'elawkwn.
byahba' yli' shlama' 'elwk 'apapra': 'asyra' d'amy byshw' mshyḥa':
wmarqws: w'aresṭarkws: wdi'ma': wlwqa': hayerany.
shapaqat dmaran yshw' mshyḥa' 'am rwḥawkwn: 'amiyn.
